---
title: "test_quick_check.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_quick_check.py"
loc: 10
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.15
style_score: 7.99
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.06
---

## Intent
The `test_quick_check.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_run_quick_check_logic, MockEngine, __init__, load_core_skills, build_index, search. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_run_quick_check_logic, MockEngine, __init__, load_core_skills, build_index, search. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.debug.quick_check](file://src.tools.debug.quick_check)

### Exports
- `test_run_quick_check_logic`
- `MockEngine`
- `__init__`
- `load_core_skills`
- `build_index`
- `search`
